description: §8.10.7/§14.8.9 — a Tier-2 loop-hoist candidate whose pre-loop SELECT would cache a protected column (`email`) in client-reachable scope fires E-PROTECT-003. The batch planner refuses the hoist (falls back to the unrewritten N+1 loop) rather than leak the protected field through the batched prefetch.
rationale: §8.10.7: the Tier-2 loop-hoist optimization pre-caches the per-iteration SELECT's columns; when those columns overlap the target table's protected fields the cache would expose a protected column to client-reachable scope, so the planner emits E-PROTECT-003 and preserves N+1 semantics instead of leaking.
